mapper.sql: SELECT r.*, ic.name AS inout_category_name, wc.name AS warehouse_category_name, re.name AS receiver_employee_name, se.name AS sender_employee_name FROM dev_inout_record r LEFT JOIN dev_inout_category ic ON ic.id = r.inout_category_id LEFT JOIN dev_warehouse_category wc ON wc.id = r.warehouse_category_id LEFT JOIN dev_employee re ON re.id = r.receiver_employee_id LEFT JOIN dev_employee se ON se.id = r.sender_employee_id
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type='out' THEN quantity ELSE 0 END), 0) AS outQty, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type='in' THEN quantity ELSE 0 END), 0) AS inQty, COUNT(*) AS recordCount FROM dev_inout_record WHERE DATE(record_time) = CURDATE() AND del_flag = '0'

SELECT re.id AS employeeId, re.name AS employeeName, re.department, COALESCE(SUM(r.quantity), 0) AS totalQty, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.receiver_type = 'employee' THEN r.quantity ELSE 0 END), 0) AS toEmployeeQty, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.receiver_type = 'outside' THEN r.quantity ELSE 0 END), 0) AS toOutsideQty FROM dev_inout_record r INNER JOIN dev_employee re ON re.id = r.receiver_employee_id WHERE r.type = 'out' AND r.receiver_type = 'employee' AND r.del_flag = '0' AND DATE_FORMAT(r.record_time, '%Y-%m') = #{yearMonth} AND r.inout_category_id = #{inoutCategoryId} GROUP BY re.id, re.name, re.department ORDER BY totalQty DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT se.id AS employeeId, se.name AS employeeName, se.department, COALESCE(SUM(r.quantity), 0) AS totalQty FROM dev_inout_record r INNER JOIN dev_employee se ON se.id = r.sender_employee_id WHERE r.type = 'in' AND r.sender_type = 'employee' AND r.del_flag = '0' AND DATE_FORMAT(r.record_time, '%Y-%m') = #{yearMonth} AND r.inout_category_id = #{inoutCategoryId} GROUP BY se.id, se.name, se.department ORDER BY totalQty DESC LIMIT 20
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dev_inout_record (record_time, type, quantity, inout_category_id, warehouse_category_id, receiver_type, receiver_employee_id, receiver_outside_note, sender_type, sender_employee_id, note, del_flag, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{recordTime}, #{type}, #{quantity}, #{inoutCategoryId}, #{warehouseCategoryId}, #{receiverType}, #{receiverEmployeeId}, #{receiverOutsideNote}, #{senderType}, #{senderEmployeeId}, #{note}, '0', #{createBy}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE dev_inout_record SET del_flag = '2' WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dev_inout_record WHERE inout_category_id = #{inoutCategoryId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dev_inout_record WHERE warehouse_category_id = #{warehouseCategoryId}
